metadata.desc: Makes AstrBot's LLM responses extremely concise, cutting ~65% of output tokens. Supports 4 compression levels (lite/full/ultra/wenyan), i18n multi-language support. Inspired by JuliusBrussee/caveman.

default_level.hint: The default caveman mode when a new session starts. Users can still switch anytime via the /caveman command.

auto_enable.hint: Automatically enable caveman mode for every new session (using the default level above). When off, users must run /caveman on manually.

language.hint: Language used for plugin replies (help text, status messages). auto = follow AstrBot global setting; or force a specific language.
